tagline: Make a wish, the genie can grant you three wishes

lang.title: Choose Your Language
lang.subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings

A.name: Letter to Future Me
A.desc: Write a wish to your future self

wish.title: Make a Wish
wish.noChances: You've used all your wishes! More types coming soon ✨
wish.success: Your wish is in the lamp!
wish.successDesc: It will drift to fellow travelers. You can track its journey anytime.
wish.selectFirst: Please select a wish type first

mailbox.title: Mailbox
mailbox.subtitle: Wishes drifted to you, awaiting your response
mailbox.emptyDesc: Wishes will drift to you soon...
mailbox.hint: When other travelers make wishes, they will drift to your mailbox
mailbox.driftedToYou: This wish drifted to you in batch {batch}
mailbox.implementDesc: Write a message to tell them how you fulfilled their wish
mailbox.forwardDesc: Share this wish to social media so more people can see and help
mailbox.shareHint: Pick a platform above to share, then tap confirm
mailbox.driftDone: The wish continues to drift. Good luck to it 🌊
mailbox.forwardDone: Forwarded! Thank you for connecting people 📨
mailbox.implementDone: Wish fulfilled! You lit up someone's world ✨
mailbox.peaceDone: May the world forever be at peace 🌍
mailbox.error: Something went wrong, please try again

mine.title: My Wishes
mine.emptyDesc: Tap the lamp to make your first wish

genie.greeting: Hello, friend. I am Aladdin's Lamp — I can grant you 3 wishes

case.downloadPrompt: Want to make a wish too?
